name: Numerically stable sigmoid
task: Create /tmp/eval_sig/sig.py with sigmoid(xs) returning a list of element-wise σ(x) = 1/(1 + e^-x). Use the numerically stable form (compute e^-|x| not e^-x for x >> 0) so that sigmoid([1000]) does NOT overflow and sigmoid([-1000]) does not underflow to NaN.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_sig/sig.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); S = mod.sigmoid; s = S([0,1000,-1000]); assert abs(s[0] - 0.5) < 1e-9; assert s[1] > 0.999999; assert s[2] >= 0; print('OK')
